channel.title: UFC News Feed
channel.description: Flux RSS non officiel enrichi des dernières actualités UFC.

item.title: International Fight Week’s Evolution Reaches Another Historic Chapter
item.description:
UFC’s Biggest Annual Spectacle, International Fight Week, Continues Its Rise With Holloway And McGregor Set To Headline A Highly Anticipated Main Event

Category: News

item.title: Fighters Who’ve Thrived Moving Up A Weight Division
item.description:
